title: Energizing Raw Friendly Canadian Butter Beans Stir-fry
description: A pitted black olive infused, raw-friendly Canadian dish featuring buttery and juicy stir-fried beans with a hint of tempeh for an added protein boost.

ingredients.name: 1 cup pitted black olives
ingredients.notes: ensure they are raw and not canned

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons tempeh slices
ingredients.notes: ensure they are raw and not fermented

instructions: Place pitted black olives, cooked Canadian butter beans, tempeh slices, minced ginger, and red pepper flakes in a bowl.
Add sesame oil to the mixture and mix well until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Serve immediately as a raw-friendly snack or meal enhancer.
